task_completion.description: Navigate to the Appointments application or Service Types management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Appointments dashboard or the Appointment Service Types list is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Appointment Service Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'New Appointment Type', 'Add Service Type', or similar is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct name for the service type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Ergonomic Assessment' is typed into the Name input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct duration for the service type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '45' is entered into the Duration input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the service type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Workplace evaluation for RSI prevention' is typed into the Description text area or input field.

task_completion.description: Save the service type and verify it appears in the active list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created 'Ergonomic Assessment' service type is visible in the saved list of appointment types, and there is no indication that it is disabled or inactive.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS web interface to create the service type
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window displaying the OpenMRS UI is used. There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands or API scripts used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('Ergonomic Assessment', '45', etc.) are typed into the actual OpenMRS web form fields, not written in a separate text editor or console.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open and being used to manually inject the 'Ergonomic Assessment' row into the HTML DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected appointment service name is exactly 'Ergonomic Assessment'. The duration must be '45' (minutes). The description must contain 'Workplace evaluation'. The service must be successfully saved and appear in the active appointment types list.
